levels.effect: Enables Change to First Job Class

2.name: Sword Mastery
2.description: Increases damage with One- Handed Sword and Dagger class weapons. This damage ignores modifications from Armor and VIT defense, but not from Elemental and Card modifiers and applies to all hits of multi-hit attacks.

3.name: Two-Handed Sword Mastery
3.description: Increases damage with Two- Handed Sword class weapons. This damage ignores modifications from Armor and VIT defense, but not from Elemental and Card modifiers and applies to all hits of multi- hit attacks.

4.name: Increase HP Recovery
4.description: Enhances natural HP regeneration and potency of healing items. Max HP affects how much HP restoration is increased by this skill. Provides SkillLevel*10% extra heal from healing items.

5.name: Bash
5.description: Hits an enemy with crushing force. If the Fatal Blow skill is learned, Bash will have an added Stun effect at level 6 or higher.

6.name: Provoke
6.description: Enrages a target to decrease its physical Defense while increasing its Attack strength for 30 seconds. Skill level affect the success chance. Ineffective against Undead and Boss monsters.

7.name: Magnum Break
7.description: Drains a small amount of the caster's HP to inflict Fire elemental area effect damage on enemies in the caster's vicinity and force them backward. For ten seconds after Magnum Break, the caster's weapon will receive a partial fire enchantment.

8.name: Endure
8.description: Makes character skip the flinch animation when hit. Caster still takes full damage from hits. A sitting character does not stand up when hit while affected by Endure. The effect cancels out after seven monster hits. However there is no limit to hits from players. The flinch immunnity effect doesn't work during War of Emperium, you only get the MDEF bonus.

9.name: Increase SP Recovery
9.description: Enhances natural SP regeneration. MaxSP affects how much SP restoration is increased by this skill when standing still or sitting. Also increases SP recovery from items by 2% per skill level.

10.name: Sight
10.description: Detects hidden enemies in a 7x7 range around the caster.

11.name: Napalm Beat
11.description: Hits enemies with ghost property damage in a 6x6 area around the target. This damage is spread evenly among the enemies hit by it.

12.name: Safety Wall
12.description: Creates a magic barrier on a spot targeted by the player that will block melee physical attacks for the duration of the Safety Wall. Melee physical attacks are considered any physical attack or skill used by a monster within four cells of the person inside the Safety Wall. Attacks do not have to hit to take away one charge of the Safety Wall. Safety Wall lasts for 5 seconds per Skill Level.

13.name: Soul Strike
13.description: Hits enemies with ghost property bolts that each do MATK damage. If the target is undead, then the attack does an extra 5% damage per skill level to the target. (Note the unique SP and Cast Delay values below.) Additionally, if the user has learned Soul Strike to level 10, the skill ignores 50% of the target's MDEF regardless of the current Soul Strike level. This MDEF ignore applies to all targets, including MVPs and Players.

14.name: Cold Bolt
14.description: Hits the enemy with bolts of ice, each with damage equal to the caster's MATK. Each level of this skill produces one additional bolt of ice (up to ten).

15.name: Frost Diver
15.description: Freezes an enemy and makes it imposible for them to move for a certain period of time. The frozen enemy is Water element while frozen. Lex Aeterna cannot be cast on frozen targets. If the caster has the Deluge buff, Frost Diver is empowered. Empowered Frost Diver increases the freeze chance by 25% and applies the Chilled status effect to non-boss monsters and players, reducing their movement speed by 40% for 10 seconds.

16.name: Stone Curse
16.description: Curses an enemy by turning it into stone, rendering it immobile. Change's enemy's element to Earth while under this effect and grants them +25% MDEF and -50% DEF. Also causes 1% of Max HP as damage every 5 secs (this effect cannot cause enemy's HP to drop below 25% health).

17.name: Fire Ball
17.description: Attacks a target with a large fireball that hits all enemies in a 5x5 area around target.

18.name: Fire Wall
18.description: Creates a Fire Wall that will block enemies from approaching the caster. Each hit deals half the MATK of the caster.

19.name: Fire Bolt
19.description: Hits the enemy with bolts of fire, each with damage equal to the caster's MATK. Each level of this skill produces one additional fire bolt (up to ten).

20.name: Lightning Bolt
20.description: Hits the enemy with lightning bolts, each with damage equal to the caster's MATK. Each level of this skill produces one additional lightning bolt (up to ten).

21.name: Thunder Storm
21.description: Hits enemies with lightning in a 5x5 area around the target. Each level of this skill produces one additional lightning bolt (up to ten) every 0.2 seconds. Each bolt does 80% of the caster's MATK.

22.name: Divine Protection
22.description: Increases VIT Defense against Demons and Undead monsters. ATK is lowered after other defense modifications are taken into effect. The effect is increased by base level slightly.

23.name: Demon Bane
23.description: Increases attack strength against all monsters and especially against Demon or Undead monsters. Undead/Demon: The effect is increased by: [ ( Base Level + 1 ) / 2 ]

24.name: Ruwach
24.description: Detects hidden enemies in a 5x5 range around the caster. Does 145% of MATK to any enemies that are revealed by this spell as Holy-based Attack.

25.name: Pneuma
25.description: Creates a 3x3 cell cloud around the targeted cell that blocks all ranged Physical attacks.

26.name: Teleport
26.description: Teleport the caster to other area on the same map. Level 1 does not require any confirmation prompt and is executed as soon as the caster uses the skill.

27.name: Warp Portal
27.description: Create a Warp Portal that will teleport those who enter it to another area. Each Warp Portal can teleport up to 8 people.

28.name: Heal
28.description: Restores a target's HP or Attacks undead. Only Base Level and INT of the cast and the skill level affect the amount healed. On Undead monsters, the skill ignores MDEF and INT, but deals half Attack (after modifiers) for the undead property.

29.name: Increase Agility
29.description: Increases the target's movement speed by 25% and also dispels Decrease AGI. Can be dispelled by Decrease AGI and Quagmire. The skill consumes a small bit of HP when cast along with the SP Cost.

30.name: Decrease Agility
30.description: Decreases the target's movement speed by 25% and also dispels Increase AGI, Adrenaline Rush, Sword Quickening, Spear Quicken, and Cart Boost. Stacks with the effects of quagmire. Duration is halved on players. Success rate is equal to: [40 + (2 * Skill Level) + ( BLvl + INT ) / 5 - TarMDEF]%

31.name: Aqua Benedicta
31.description: Creates 1 Holy Water. Caster must stand in pool of water for the skill to succeed. Holy water can cure Curse Status when used and also can be used for other buffs cast by the Priest.

32.name: Signum Crucis
32.description: Reduces the Hard DEF of all Undead and Demon monsters on screen. Success rate equal to: [23+(4*Skill Level)+Base Level-Target Level]% Skill stacks with the effects of Provoke.

33.name: Angelus
33.description: Temporarily Increases VIT defense of all party members on screen.

34.name: Blessing
34.description: Buffs the target and removes any curse effect on the target. When cast on Undead monsters, this spell will reduce the monster's HIT and MATK but has no effect on ATK. Does not work on Boss Monsters or players of Undead Property.

35.name: Cure
35.description: Cures Blind, Confusion, and Silence statuses.

37.name: Discount
37.description: Allows buying Items at reduced prices from NPC shops and reduces the zeny cost of Mammonite skill.

38.name: Overcharge
38.description: Allows selling Items at increased prices to NPC shops.

39.name: Pushcart
39.description: Allows the character to equip and use a pushcart. Pushcart has an 8000 maximum weight capacity and 100 inventory slots. To access the cart directly use Alt+W

40.name: Item Appraisal
40.description: Enables the caster to identify unknown items without using a Magnifier.

41.name: Vending
41.description: Allows the character to set up a shop at their current location. The items you want to sell must be in a pushcart and the character must have their pushcart equipped. Double check your prices!

42.name: Mammonite
42.description: Uses a certain amount of Zeny to deal high Attack to target. The zeny cost is reduced by 5% per level of the Merchant skill [Discount].

44.name: Vulture's Eye
44.description: Increases Hit and attack range of bow class weapon. The absolute maximum range of any attack is 16 Cells.

45.name: Improve Concentration
45.description: Increases DEX and AGI of the character. Only affected by base stats. Detects hidden and cloaked characters within a 3 cell range. Can also remove the Illusion status effect (screen inverted effect).

46.name: Double Strafing
46.description: Consumes 1 arrow to do a ranged attack that damages the enemy with two hits. Can only be used while a bow is equipped.

47.name: Arrow Shower
47.description: Consumes 1 arrow to do a ranged attack that damages enemies in a 3x3 area around the target. Can only be used while a bow is equipped. Pushes the enemies hit by this attack back 1 cell.

48.name: Double Attack
48.description: Allows character to hit twice with dagger class weapons. Also increases Katar damage if a Katar weapon is equipped.

49.name: Improve Dodge
49.description: Increases flee rate. Flee rate increases further upon reaching 2nd class.

50.name: Steal
50.description: Steals an item from monster. Once an item is stolen from a monster, a second item cannot be stolen. Does not work on enemies that are Frozen, Stone Cursed, or Boss Monsters.

51.name: Hiding
51.description: Toggles the hide effect on the character on or off. Toggling the hide effect off consumes no SP. Hidden characters cannot move, attack or use any skills (except certain Rogue skills) and do not regenerate HP or SP. The hide effect makes a character invisible to other players and monsters. This stops skills and spells that are targeted at you from working. Can be broken by Ruwach, Detect, Sight or Heaven's Drive. Insects, Demons and Boss monsters can see through hide.

52.name: Envenom
52.description: A Weapon element attack that has a chance to inflict the poison status on enemies. The skill does base weapon damage plus 15% additional attack per skill level.

53.name: Detoxify
53.description: Removes Poison status from a targeted character. Can also remove the Illusion status from players (screen inverted effect).

54.name: Resurrection
54.cast_delay: Up to 3 Seconds at Max Level
54.description: Returns a dead character to life with the indicated percentage of HP restored. When used on Undead property monsters, it has a chance to instantly kill or at least damage in the same way as Turn Undead at the same level.

55.name: Spear Mastery
55.description: Increases damage with Spear class weapons. When riding a PecoPeco, the damage is increased.

56.name: Pierce
56.description: Attacks an enemy using a thrusting stab with a number of additional hits that depend on the monster's size. Requires Spear class weapon. Small Monsters: 1 hit Medium Monsters: 2 hits Large Monsters: 3 hits

57.name: Brandish Spear
57.description: A powerful lancing strike made while riding a PecoPeco. Can only be performed while mounted on a PecoPeco. During the cast, character's DEF is reduced to 2/3 its total amount. Knocks back enemies by up to two cells. Requires Spear class weapon.

levels.effect: Up to 140% ATK, Splash Range 1 Cell
Up to 180% ATK, Splash Range 1 Cell
Up to 220% ATK, Splash Range 1 Cell
Up to 260% ATK, Splash Range 2 Cells
Up to 300% ATK, Splash Range 2 Cells
Up to 340% ATK, Splash Range 2 Cells
Up to 380% ATK, Splash Range 3 Cells
Up to 420% ATK, Splash Range 3 Cells
Up to 460% ATK, Splash Range 3 Cells
Up to 500% ATK, Splash Range 4 Cells

58.name: Spear Stab
58.description: Attacks an enemy with a forceful spear stab that will knock them back by 1+SkillLv cells. Requires Spear class weapon.

59.name: Sonic Wave
59.description: Attacks an enemy from a distance by hurling a spear. Requires Spear class weapon.

60.name: Sword Quickening
60.description: Decreases weapon swing delay with Swords by 30%. This skill only works with Sword class weapons and the effect cancels when switching to any other type of weapon. Skill also increases FLEE and CRIT rate for its duration. When attacking with Sword Quickening, Grants 5% chance to gain Living Sword for 30 seconds. Works with One-Hand Sword for 30% the effect mentioned.

61.name: Counter Attack
61.description: Puts character into the counter stance until duration expires. If attacked while in counter stance, character will block the attack and counter attack at 200% damage. While in the counter stance, the character cannot move. The counter attack doubles Critical Rate but that doesn't mean the user can hit the target without failure.

62.name: Bowling Bash
62.description: A powerful area strike that knocks back enemies and causes those enemies to damage other nearby enemies. During the cast, the character's DEF is reduced to 2/3 its total amount.

64.name: Cavalry Mastery
64.description: Increases attack speed while mounted on a Pecopeco. Mastering this skill raises attack speed so that attack speed reduction while mounted on a Peco is fully nullified.

65.name: Battle Mastery
65.description: Increases damage with Maces and Books that can be equipped by the Priest. Also decreases weapon attack speed delay by 12% on Maces if the Priest has learned the maximum level of this skill.

66.name: Impositio Manus
66.description: Blesses a targeted player by increasing the weapon damage of that character for 2 minutes. The additional attack is modified by size and reduced by the target's DEF.

67.name: Suffragium
67.description: This invocation can only be used on others and will not work on caster. Reduces cast time of a skill for a single cast. Has no effect on targets that can cast skills instantly.

68.name: Aspersio
68.description: Endows the targeted player's weapon with the Holy element for the skill's duration. Changing weapons will cancel the effect. You can also use this skill as a weak attack against undead similar to Heal and inflicts 40 points of Holy Property damage.

69.name: Benedictio Sanctissimi Sacramenti
69.description: This Benedictio Sanctissimi Sacramenti blessing endows the armor of all party members in a 3x3 area around the target with the Holy element. The skill requires an Acolyte or Priest to be adjacent to the caster in order to function. Undead and Demon monsters within the range of the skill will be damaged by Holy element equal to 1/2 the damage produced by a heal of the same level.

70.name: Sanctuary
70.description: Creates a 5x5 area sanctuary effect around the targeted cell. Characters and non- undead or Demon monsters within the sanctuary are healed once a second unless at max HP. If the monster entering the Sanctuary is Demon or Undead race, it will take damage equal to half the Sanctuary's heal every second. Can heal up to 26 targets at maximum level or damage up to half that amount at maximum level.

71.name: Renew
71.description: Awakens the regenerative properties of the target, refreshing their HP at a very fast rate. Regeneration occurs every 3 seconds for 30 seconds. Cannot be cast on monsters (including the undead). The skill also negates the HP drain of Poison Status but does not actually cure Poison. This skill is dispellable like other buffs.

72.name: Status Recovery
72.description: Cancels abnormal status effects such as Frozen, Stone Curse, Sleep, Stun, White Imprison or Poem of The Netherworld. Can cause Blind effect on the Undead.

73.name: Kyrie Eleison
73.description: Create a barrier around a character that will be able to withstand a certain number of attacks, before barrier is broken. Otherwise, it lasts for 2 minutes. Holy Light skill immediately cancels this skill.

74.name: Magnificat
74.description: Doubles the caster and party's SP regen for the duration of the skill.

75.name: Gloria
75.description: Adds 30 LUK to the caster and party members for the duration of the skill.

76.name: Lex Divina
76.description: This skill has a chance of inflicting the Silence status on the selected target. Does not work against Boss monsters. The success rate is equal to: 100 - (TargetVIT + TargetLUK/8) + INT/15 %.

77.name: Turn Undead
77.description: Attacks Undead monster with an exorcist skill that will cause a good amount of damage and has a chance to instantly kill the targeted Undead monster This skill only works on Undead monsters.

78.name: Lex Aeterna
78.description: Weakens an enemy so that it will receive twice as much damage from the next attack that hits it. Ineffective against enemies afflicted by the Frozen or Stone Curse status.

79.name: Magnus Exorcismus
79.description: Calls down a Grand Cross in a 7x7 area around the targeted cell. Any Demon or Undead property monsters entering the area of the effect suffer Holy property damage in waves of damage. Waves occur approximately every 3 seconds and each wave hits a number of times equal to the skill level of the spell. The spell cannot stack with other ground effect skills (e.g. Pneuma and Safety Wall).

81.name: Sightrasher
81.description: Can only be cast when Sight is active. Shoots fire in all 8 directions away from the caster, each Fireball does damage that pushes the target back. The range of the fireballs is up to 7 cells. Knocks back up to 5 cells.

83.name: Meteor Storm
83.cast_delay: Up to 7 Seconds at Max Level
83.description: Summons Meteors that strike cells in the 3x3 target area and does Fire Element damage in the 7x7 area they impact for each hit.

84.name: Jupitel Thunder
84.description: Hits the target with a ball of lightning that hits a number of times using the Wind Element and pushes the target back up to 8 Cells (based on skill level). Damage is equal to MATK each hit.

85.name: Lord of Vermillion
85.description: Hits the target area with a strong lightning attack that does 4 sets of hits with 10 hits for each set (total 40 hits). Can also blind any targets hit by this attack. the MATK damage is (20% MATK x Skill Lv x Wave #) 10% Chance to silence on each wave

86.name: Water Ball
86.description: Hits the target with balls of water that exponentially scale with the level of this skill. The caster must be standing in water and higher levels of this skill require a larger water source. While natural water cannot be depleted, this skill will empty tiles of the Sage skill Deluge when this skill is used. The level of skill first checks the area around you based on skill level in a square grid then counts how many usable water tiles there are then fires waterballs based on the water available.

87.name: Ice Wall
87.description: Creates a row of 5 Ice Wall cells perpendicular to the line between the caster and the target cell and centered on the target cell. An Ice Wall cell cannot be entered, but it may be attacked. Ice Wall cells have HP that lowers at a rate of 50 per second until it reaches 0 and then the wall disappears. If the wall is attacked the HP also is reduced by the damage dealt to the wall. You can not have more than 5 Ice Walls active at the same time.

88.name: Frost Nova
88.description: Hits every enemy in a 5x5 area around the target with a frost attack. For every level of Frost Diver that the wizard has learned, the MATK of Frost Nova increases by 10%. If the player casts level 5 of this skill, it causes the Hypothermia status effect on all enemies hit by it.

89.name: Storm Gust
89.description: Summons a blizzard that hits targets in the area of effect every 0.5 seconds and pushes those it hits randomly. Monsters hit 3 times will freeze and not receive further hits, except undead and MVP which are immune to frozen and thus will receive more hits. The maximum number of possible hits is 10.

90.name: Earth Spike
90.description: Hits the enemy with earth spikes, each with damage equal to the 140% of caster's MATK. Each level of this skill produces one additional earth spike (up to five).

91.name: Heaven's Drive
91.description: Hits enemies in a 5x5 area with a small earthquake. Enemies hit by this spell receive damage equal to the 140% of caster's MATK. Each level of this skill causes one additional hit (up to five).

92.name: Quagmire
92.description: Temporarily converts targeted area with a marshland that will reduce the Movement Speed, AGI and DEX of all targets by 10% per skill level (up to a 50% reduction). In PvP maps this effect is half as effective. This skill does not work on Bosses except to reduce their Movement Speed.

93.name: Sense
93.description: Brings up a window with information about the targeted monster such as HP, element, level, etc at the time the spell is cast. Party members also see this window.

94.name: Iron Tempering
94.description: Enables the tempering of 1 Iron with 1 Iron Ore and 1 Mini Furnace.

95.name: Steel Tempering
95.description: Enables the tempering of 1 Steel with 5 Iron, 1 Coal and 1 Mini Furnace.

96.name: Enchanted Stone Craft
96.description: Enables the refining of enchanted ores with 10 Green Live, 10 Wind of Verdures, 10 Red Blood, 10 Crystal Blue, or 10 Star Dust with a Mini Furnace.

97.name: Research Oridecon
97.description: Increases the success rate of forging items with Oridecon by 1% per Skill Level.

98.name: Smith Dagger
98.description: Enables forging of Dagger class weapons. Forging chance is affected by Job Level, DEX, LUK, Anvil, and certain refining and forging skills.

99.name: Smith Sword
99.description: Enables forging of Sword class weapons. Forging chance is affected by Job Level, DEX, LUK, Anvil, and certain refining and forging skills.

100.name: Smith Two-Handed Sword
100.description: Enables forging of Two-Handed Sword class weapons. Forging chance is affected by Job Level, DEX, LUK, Anvil, and certain refining and forging skills.

101.name: Smith Axe
101.description: Enables forging of Axe class weapons. Forging chance is affected by Job Level, DEX, LUK, Anvil, and certain refining and forging skills.

102.name: Smith Mace
102.description: Enables forging of Mace class weapons. Forging chance is affected by Job Level, DEX, LUK, Anvil, and certain refining and forging skills.

103.name: Smith Brass Knuckle
103.description: Enables forging of Knuckle weapons. Forging chance is affected by Job Level, DEX, LUK, Anvil, and certain refining and forging skills.

104.name: Smith Spear
104.description: Enables forging of Spear weapons. Forging chance is affected by Job Level, DEX, LUK, Anvil, and certain refining and forging skills.

105.name: Hilt Binding
105.description: Increases the duration of the Adrenaline Rush, Power Thrust and Weapon Perfection skills by 10%. This skill also adds +1 STR and +4 ATK.

106.name: Finding Ore
106.description: Increases the success rate of finding ores dropped from monsters.

107.name: Weaponry Research
107.description: Improves weapon knowledge in order to create arms of higher quality. Also improves ATK and HIT rating. Increases HitRate by (2*SkillLv)%

108.name: Repair Weapon
108.description: Repairs damaged weapons. Names of weapons that have been damaged are displayed in red text.

109.name: Skin Tempering
109.description: Increases resistance to Fire and Neutral elemental attacks.

110.name: Hammer Fall
110.description: Attempts to stun targets in 5x5 area surrounding the targeted cell. Stun duration is 5 seconds (reduced by VIT). Can only be used with maces and axes. Does not work against Bosses. Applies Mailbreaker(+10% Damage received) effect on target

111.name: Adrenaline Rush
111.description: Decreases character's attack delay with maces and axes by 30%. Decreases nearby characters in party's attack delay with maces and axes by 20%. This skill cannot stack, but overwrites the effect and duration from other Smiths if it is worse. Changing from a mace/axe to any other weapon (including bare fists) cancels the effect.

112.name: Weapon Perfection
112.description: Nullifies any reduction in damage resulting from monster size.

113.name: Over Thrust
113.description: Enhances the Attack Power of equipped weapon greatly.

114.name: Maximize Power
114.description: Amplifies Weapon Attack Power by continuously draining a specific amount of SP while skill is active. This skill can be cancelled by casting it once again. Attacks as though you had unlimited DEX (without actually impacting your HIT rate.

115.name: Skid Trap
115.description: A Skid Trap is a trap that activates when someone comes in proximity it. When activated, the affected target is pushed back a certain number of cells. Skid Traps are invisible, but any player who can see the Hunter laying the trap will be able to see the trap until they move out of sight of it. Use of any Hide revealing skill will reveal the trap. This trap will affect Players in PVP zones, including the user. Does not work on Boss and Plant monsters. If not tripped by the end of the duration, the Skid Trap will turn back into a Trap item that can be picked up. Consumes 1 Trap.

116.name: Land Mine
116.description: A Land Mine is a visible trap that explodes when stepped on, hitting the monster or player (in PvP only) that triggered it. This skill ignores DEF and MDEF and damage modification cards for size and family, but not elemental property. There is also a (5*SkillLV+30)% chance to stun targets for 5 seconds. This trap will affect Players in PVP zones, including the user. If not tripped by the end of the duration, the Land Mine will turn back into a Trap item that can be picked up. Consumes 1 Trap.

117.name: Ankle Snare
117.description: Creates an Ankle Snare in the targeted cell. Any monster that steps within 1 cell of the trap will become snared. In PvP zones, players may be snared too (including the creator of the trap). Boss monsters are snared for 1/8th of the normal time and may teleport if snared. A snared target cannot sit, stand, or move away from the cell on which they are snared but can use skills and items and make attacks on anyone within melee range. The skill Remove Trap can be used to cancel an Ankle Snare that has already caught a player. Ankle Snare traps are invisible in PvP, but any player who can see the Hunter laying the trap will be able to see the trap until they move out of sight of it. If not tripped by the end of the duration, the Ankle Snare will turn back into a Trap item that can be picked up. Consumes 1 Trap.

118.name: Shockwave Trap
118.description: The Trap activates when stepped on. Whoever trips the trap will lose a percent of their max SP. Shockwave Traps are invisible, but any player who can see the Hunter laying the trap will be able to see the trap until they move out of sight of it. Use of any Hide revealing skill will reveal the trap. This trap will affect Players in PVP zones, including the user. If not tripped by the end of the duration, the Shockwave Trap will turn back into a Trap item on the floor and can be reclaimed. Consumes 1 Trap.

levels.effect: 20% of Max SP Drained / Trap Stays 200s
35% of Max SP Drained / Trap Stays 160s
50% of Max SP Drained / Trap Stays 120s
65% of Max SP Drained / Trap Stays 80s
80% of Max SP Drained / Trap Stays 40s

119.name: Sandman
119.description: Sandman is a trap that activates if stepped on. All targets in a 3x3 area around the trap will have a (40+10*SklLV)% chance of being affected by the Sleep status. Sandman traps are invisible, but any player who can see the Hunter laying the trap will be able to see the trap until they move out of sight of it. Use of any invisibility revealing skill will reveal the trap. This trap will affect Players in PVP zones, including the user. If not tripped by the end of the duration, this trap will turn back into a Trap item on the floor and can be reclaimed. Consumes 1 Trap.

120.name: Flasher
120.description: Flashers are traps that activate when stepped on. When activated it will have a chance to blind all targets within a 3x3 area around the trap. Flasher traps are invisible, but any player who can see the Hunter laying the trap can also see the trap until they move out of sight of it. Use of any invisibility revealing skill will reveal the trap. This trap will affect Players in PVP zones, including the user. This trap is ineffective against Plant family and MVP monsters. If not tripped by the end of the duration, the Flasher will turn back into a Trap item on the floor and can be reclaimed. Consumes 1 Trap.

121.name: Freezing Trap
121.description: Freezing Traps activate when stepped on. When activated, it will hit all in the area 3x3 area with a Frost Nova style attack. This trap does not work against Boss monsters. Freezing Traps are invisible, but any player who can see the Hunter laying the trap will be able to see the trap until they move out of sight of it. Use of any invisibility revealing skill will reveal the trap. This trap will affect Players in PVP zones, including the user. If not tripped by the end of the duration, the Freezing Trap will turn back into a Trap item on the floor and can be reclaimed. Consumes 1 Trap.

122.name: Blast Mine
122.description: A Blast mine is a visible trap that explodes a short period after it is set or when an enemy steps on it. It hits all targets in a 3x3 area around where the trap was triggered. This skill ignores DEF and MDEF and damage mod cards for size and family, but not elemental property. This trap will affect Players in PVP zones, including the user. The caster can move the trap before it is activated. Consumes 1 Trap.

123.name: Claymore Trap
123.description: Sets a Claymore Trap that is visible and explodes when stepped on, hitting a 5x5 area around the target cell with Fire damage. This skill ignores DEF and MDEF and damage modification cards for size and family, but not elemental property. This trap will affect Players in PVP zones, including the user. If not tripped by the end of the duration, the trap will turn back into a Trap item on the floor and can be reclaimed. Consumes 1 Trap.

124.name: Remove Trap
124.description: Removes a trap that you can see. You only get one trap item even if the trap required two to lay it. Can be used with an Ankle Snare that has already caught a target, but in this case you will not get a Trap item. Only works with your own traps.

125.name: Talkie Box
125.description: Sets a trap which will last for 600 seconds and will display a prepared message for the person who triggers it. Consumes 1 Trap.

126.name: Beast Bane
126.description: Increases Attack Power against Brute and Insect monsters. Brute enemies are sometimes also called Beast monsters. This damage ignores modification from Armor and VIT defense, but not from Elemental and Card modifiers and applies to all hits for multi hit attacks.

127.name: Falconry Mastery
127.description: Enables renting of a Falcon from the Hunter Guild.

128.name: Steel Crow
128.description: Increases the damage inflicted by the Hunter's pet falcon on each hit (up to 5 hits for Blitz Beat).

129.name: Blitz Beat
129.description: Commands Falcon to attack a target. Leveling this skill also increases the chance of automatic attacks from the Falcon when attacking an enemy with a Bow Class Weapon. The Falcon's Attack Range is equal to the level of Vulture's Eye skill +3, up to 16 Cells.

130.name: Detect
130.description: Reveals any invisible traps, monsters or players in a 3x3 cell area around the target cell.

131.name: Spring Trap
131.description: Uses the Falcon to destroy a trap within range. No trap item is recovered. This skill can work on enemy traps (unlike Remove Trap).

132.name: Right-Hand Mastery
132.description: Increases the damage of the right hand weapon when equipped with dual weapons. Equipping two weapons at once reduces the Attack Power of the weapon in the right hand, which can be recovered through acquisition of this skill.

133.name: Left-Hand Mastery
133.description: Increases the damage of the left hand weapon when equipped with dual weapons. Equipping two weapons at once reduces the Attack Power of the weapon in the left hand, which can be recovered through acquisition of this skill.

134.name: Katar Mastery
134.description: Increases damaged inflicted with Katar class weapons as well as their critical rate if the highest level of this skill is known. CRIT + 5% per skill level while using Katar

135.name: Cloaking
135.description: Gives the player the Cloaked effect, it makes the user invisible to players and monsters but you don't lose the ability to move. Cloaked characters do not regenerate HP or SP, they can attack but this uncloaks them. Attacking while cloaked doubles the critical rate for that hit. Insects, Demons and Boss monsters can see through this invisibility. The Cloaked effect may be cancelled at any time by using the skill again (no SP Cost), by getting hit, reaching SP 0 or by coming into the area of effect of Attention Concentrate, Ruwach or Sight. Movement speed is increased if cloaking while against a wall. Level 3 or Higher:  Can be used with Hiding. Deals double damage on first auto-attack from Cloaking state

136.name: Sonic Blow
136.description: A series of 8 fast hits that does damage and has a chance to stun the target. The damage is applied instantly. The skill can miss and can only be used with Katars. Stuns up to 5 seconds. Requires Katar class weapon. 10% more damage if used while in cloak state

137.name: Grimtooth
137.description: A ranged attack that hits a 3x3 area around the target. Skill only be used while Hiding. Cloaking will not work with this skill. Can only be used with Katar class weapons. Requires Katar class weapon.

138.name: Enchant Poison
138.description: Temporarily enchants equipped weapon with the Poison element. Poison enchanted weapons have a chance of inflicting targets with the Poison status. Passive Bonus:  Increases damage against Poison element monsters by 2% per level.

139.name: Poison React
139.description: Attempts to counter up to six attacks that damage you (using Level 5 Envenom or Poison attack) that causes extra damage if the skill is active. The success rate is 100% for the Boosted Counter and 50% for Envenom Counter. Note: Lifesteal is passive bonus

140.name: Venom Dust
140.description: Creates a poison cloud covering cells vertically and horizontally adjacent to target cell. Anything except a Boss monster that stands on the cloud will be Poisoned. Those poisoned by this ability will be poisoned for up to 50 seconds. Mailbreaker debuff is applied to unit standing on venom dust. Mailbreaker Effect: Damage taken by unit increases by 10%

141.name: Venom Splasher
141.description: Turns target into a poison bomb. If the skill is successful, and a certain amount of time passes, the target explodes and takes poison damage. The Poison React skill passively adds bonus damage to the explosion. The surrounding 5x5 area takes splash damage which is the original damage.

143.name: Play Dead
143.description: Feign death to avoid the menace of nearby enemies. The Play Dead status is cancelled by casting this skill again. Only usable by Novices.

144.name: Moving HP Recovery
144.description: Enables HP regen while moving. Only 25% of the HP that is recovered while standing is restored during movement. The Increase Recovery skill does not affect HP Recovery While Moving.

145.name: Fatal Blow
145.description: Causes Stun status on targeted enemy when using Level 6 Bash or higher. The chance of inflicting Stun increases with Bash skill level and Base Level of the caster (Formula: BaseChance*BaseLevel/50).

146.name: Auto Berserk
146.description: Empowered by rage, character enters a condition that is equivalent to Level 10 Provoke status when HP is below 25% of its maximum. Provoked status lasts until character HP is restored to more than 25% of Max HP or if Provoke effect is nullified.

147.name: Arrow Crafting
147.description: Creates arrows from an item. Different items give different amounts and types of arrows. Cannot be used if above 70% weight.

148.name: Charge Arrow
148.description: Draws the bowstring to its limit to fire a volley of arrows with enough force to push the target 4 cells back. Consumes one arrow.

149.name: Sprinkle Sand
149.description: Kicks sand into enemy face which will inflict 130% damage and also chance to cause Blind or Stun on the target. This attack is Earth property.

150.name: Back Slide
150.description: Quickly move backwards to position yourself safely away from threats by 5 cells.

151.name: Pick Stone
151.description: Picks up a Stone from the ground.

152.name: Throw Stone
152.description: Attacks an enemy with a Stone which inflicts 50 damage that will pierce enemy's defense and has a 3% chance to inflict Stun status. Each cast requires one Stone.

153.name: Cart Revolution
153.description: A splashed damage attack in which a Pushcart is smashed into a target. Inflicts 250% of the damage of a normal attack. The attack also pushes targets back 2 cells. You must have a pushcart equipped to use this skill.

154.name: Change Cart
154.description: Changes the Pushcart appearance. There are five different Pushcart styles that are chosen according to the character's Base Level.

155.name: Crazy Uproar
155.description: Screams with battle vigor to add +4 STR for 5 minutes.

156.name: Holy Light
156.description: Summons holy light to counter evil. The skill does [100% + (1 + Base Level)]% MATK.

157.name: Energy Coat
157.description: While active, reduces damage from physical attacks by draining the caster's SP. See the table below for the skill's potency.

210.name: Snatcher
210.description: Gives the Rogue a chance to steal an item from monsters while attacking them. The success rate of stealing items is affected by the skill level of the Thief skill, Steal. Each level of Steal increases the rate by 1%. This skill works with 'Bow', but chance is reduced by 50% and only works when distance between target and caster is less than 4

211.name: Steal Coin
211.description: Steals Zeny from a monster. The success rate is equal to 1% per skill level, increased further by 0.05% per point of DEX and LUK and 0.2% for each level the Rogue is above the targeted monster. The actual amount stolen is completely dependent on this skill's level and the level of the monster. You can steal both zeny and an item from a monster but you may only steal zeny one time per monster.

212.name: Back Stab
212.description: Attempts a devious attack. The skill can be done while in hide status and cannot be avoided by the enemy. Can only be used with Dagger, Sword, or no weapon Monster attacking someone else won't switch to you when Backstabbing

214.name: Raid
214.description: Only usable while in Hiding status and will cancel Hiding once used. Can inflict Blind and Stun statuses to those enemies hit. The next 7 hits on enemies hit from any sources will deal 10% more damage.

215.name: Strip Weapon
215.description: Forcibly strips the Weapon off a target. In PVP, targeted character temporarily cannot re-equip Weapon. On monsters, this skill will temporarily reduce the monster's Attack Power by 40%. Level difference between caster and target affects the chance of success

216.name: Strip Shield
216.description: Forcibly strips the Shield off a target. In PVP, targeted character temporarily cannot re-equip Shield. On monsters, this skill will temporarily reduce the monster's Defense by 30%. Level difference between caster and target affects the chance of success

217.name: Strip Armor
217.description: Forcibly strips the Armor off a target. In PVP, targeted character temporarily cannot re-equip Armor. On monsters, this skill will temporarily reduce the monster's Magic Defense stat by 30%. Level difference between caster and target affects the chance of success

218.name: Strip Helm
218.description: Forcibly strips the Helm off a target. In PVP, targeted character temporarily cannot re-equip Helmet. On monsters, this skill will temporarily reduce the monster's INT by 40%. Level difference between caster and target affects the chance of success

219.name: Intimidate
219.description: Strikes a target and forcibly teleports them with the caster to a random location on the same map. This skill's success rate is affected by the level difference between caster and target. Boss monsters are unaffected by Intimidate. This skill cannot be used on GvG maps.

220.name: Graffiti
220.description: Scribbles graffiti around a targeted cell with a message of up to 20 characters. Graffiti cannot be overlapped or painted over before it disappears. Requires 1 Red Gemstone.

221.name: Flag Graffiti
221.description: Paints graffiti over a guild's flag which will be shown instead of the guild's emblem. This skill's level affects the amount of graffiti that can be painted. Requires 1 Giant Paint Brush.

222.name: Cleaner
222.description: Removes graffiti from a guild flag. Requires 1 Wet Duster.

223.name: Gangster's Paradise
223.description: After 5 seconds of sitting aggressive monsters, except Boss monsters, won't attack, health regenerate at a rate of 1% per second, and SP regens 10% faster.

224.name: Compulsion Discount
224.description: Purchases item from NPC shops at lower prices.

225.name: Plagiarism
225.description: Enables the use of the last skill that was inflicted by an enemy. This can only be used to remember character skills, and cannot enable the use of skills exclusive to monsters. The maximum skill level memorized is either the skill level cast by the enemy or the skill level of Plagiarism, whichever is lower.

226.name: Axe Mastery
226.description: Increases damaged inflicted with Axe class weapons as well as their attack speed if the highest level of this skill is known.

227.name: Learning Potion
227.description: Increases effectiveness of healing items. Also increases potion creation success rate.

228.name: Pharmacy
228.description: Enables manufacturing of potions and chemicals. The correct Potion Creation Guide is needed to create specific potions. Increases success rate of brewing by 3% per skill level.

229.name: Demonstration
229.description: Targets an area and sets it on fire Affects a 3x3 area of effect. Consumes 1 Bottle Grenade if available. If reagent is used, The flames have a chance to damage the enemy's weapon. Ticks every 1 second

230.name: Acid Terror
230.description: Fling a bottle of corrosive acid at the enemy that has a chance of damaging the target's armor or causing the Bleeding effect if a reagent is used.

levels.effect: 180% Attack / 3% Chance to Break Armor (if bottle is used)
260% Attack / 7% Chance to Break Armor (if bottle is used)
340% Attack / 10% Chance to Break Armor (if bottle is used)
420% Attack / 12% Chance to Break Armor (if bottle is used)
500% Attack / 13% Chance to Break Armor (if bottle is used)

231.name: Potion Pitcher
231.description: Throw a potion at yourself or a party or guild member, doing increased healing. The healing stacks with any bonuses already experienced by the target. Does not work offensively against Undead.

levels.effect: +10% Healing Power, grants Cure / Red Potion
+20% Healing Power, grants Endure / Orange Potion
+30% Healing Power, grants Status Recovery / Yellow Potion
+40% Healing Power, grants Renew / White Potion
+50% Healing Power, grants Magnificat / Blue Potion

232.name: Bio Cannibalize
232.description: Puts a plant monster on a cell. This Plant monster's stats are increased by the caster's STR, AGI, VIT, and INT. Skill level will also increase the plant's HP.

233.name: Sphere Mine
233.description: Summons a Marine Sphere with a custom HP formula. After being hit, it starts a 5 second countdown and moves away from the attacker. When the countdown reaches 0 it explodes and inflicts damage to anyone enemies equal to its remaining HP. You cannot summon more than 3 spheres in a 9x9 area. The Maximum HP is based on your skill level and when used in WoE, the defense value of the castle will raise the defense of the Sphere.

234.name: Chemical Protection Weapon
234.description: Causes an equipped weapon to become unbreakable for the skill's duration, also protects against Rogue skill Strip Weapon.

235.name: Chemical Protection Shield
235.description: Causes an equipped shield to become unbreakable for the skill's duration, also protects against Rogue skill Strip Shield.

236.name: Chemical Protection Armor
236.description: Causes an equipped armor to become unbreakable for the skill's duration, also protects against Rogue skill Strip Armor.

237.name: Chemical Protection Helm
237.description: Causes an equipped helmet to become unbreakable for the skill's duration, also protects against Rogue skill Strip Helm.

238.name: Bioethics
238.description: A skill that is fundamental in enabling the creation of Homunculus.

239.name: Biotechnology
239.description: Researches biotechnology in order to increase Homunculus creation success rate and Homunculus's MaxHP.

240.name: Create Creature
240.description: Creates an embryo. Skill level affects success chance. Ingredients for making an embryo: - Glass Tube, Morning Dew of Yggdrasil, Seed of Life, 1 each. - Requires the Potion Creation Guide present in your inventory.

241.name: Cultivation
241.description: Developes an Embryo so that it grows into a Homunculus. Skill level affects the chance of success. Cultivation cannot be used when the caster already has a Homunculus present.

242.name: Flame Control
242.description: Increases the chance of success when using the Cultivation skill, as well as resistance to the Fire elemental attacks.

243.name: Call Homunculus
243.description: Summons an existing Homunculus that was stored by using the Rest skill. Consumes 1 Embryo.

244.name: Rest
244.description: Vaporizes Homunculus into a form that is much easier to carry around. This skill is only usable if Homunculus has at least 80% of its MaxHP. Vaporized Homunculus can be restored with the Call Homunculus skill.

246.name: Heal Homunculus
246.description: This skill has been dropped by Gravity. Casts heal on Homunculus. Skill power is that of an Acolyte's Heal.

248.name: Faith
248.description: Increases HP and resistance to Holy property attacks.

249.name: Auto Guard
249.description: Activates Auto Guard status and has a chance to block attacks. When this skill blocks an attack, the caster is immobilized for 0.3 seconds but this time can be reduced by increasing the skill's level. Casting this skill again cancels Guard status. Requires Shield.

250.name: Shield Charge
250.description: Smashes a Shield into an enemy, pushing it a backward with a chance to stun. The pushback is equal to 4 cells + 1 cell per skill level. Requires Shield.

251.name: Shield Boomerang
251.description: Attacks an enemy from a distance by throwing your Shield. The Shield's weight and refine level affect the amount of damage that is inflicted. Requires Shield.

252.name: Reflect Shield
252.description: Reflects a certain amount of damage back to the enemy after they inflict damage with a melee physical attack. Requires Shield.

253.name: Holy Cross
253.description: Attacks an enemy with a double hit Holy attack that has the chance of causing the Blind status. This skill has a 20% accuracy bonus.

254.name: Grand Cross
254.description: Summons a cross of holy light on the ground around the caster that will damage enemies that come into contact with it. Grand Cross will cause the Blind effect on Undead and Demon monsters, but will not blind Boss monsters. The damage of Grand Cross is affected by both ATK and MATK but Weapon Masteries, Demon Bane, and +DMG% cards do not modify the damage of Grand Cross. The skill will damage the caster for 20% of their Max HP plus an amount based on the damage dealt to targets.

255.name: Devotion
255.description: Protects a party member by receiving all damage intended for that targeted ally. Devotion only works when level difference between caster and party member is within 15. The skill's effect is canceled when the party member moves out of the skill's range or dies. Damage received by the caster is based on the targeted ally's defense, not the Crusader's defense. This skill cannot be cast on other Crusaders.

256.name: Providence
256.description: Temporarily increases party member's resistance to Demon and Holy elemental monsters. This skill cannot be cast on yourself or on other Crusaders.

257.name: Defender
257.description: Reduces damage taken from long ranged physical attacks at the cost of decreasing ASPD and movement speeds for the skill's duration. Casting this skill again cancels the Defender status. The ASPD reduction can be reversed by higher skill levels but the 1/3 reduction in movement speed cannot be reversed. Requires Shield.

258.name: Spear Quicken
258.description: Increases attack speed when using spear weapons for the skill's duration. Also adds +1 CRIT per skill level.

259.name: Iron Hand
259.description: Increases damage with bare hands and Knuckle class weapons and their attack speed.

260.name: Spirits Recovery
260.description: Restores additional HP and SP every 5 seconds while sitting. If user's carried weight is over 70% of the maximum capacity, this extra HP and SP is recovered every 10 seconds. Can be used after casting Asura to regenerate HP/SP. HP is regenerated at 6 * Skill Level and SP is regnerated at 3 * Skill Level. The rate is further increased by the Monk's max HP and SP.

261.name: Call Spirits
261.description: Summons a Spirit Sphere, which can be used to use certain abilities. Each spirit sphere adds 3 ATK.

262.name: Absorb Spirits
262.description: Uses all Spirit Spheres and regains 10 SP per sphere. Can be used on another Monk's Spheres in PVP. If used against a monster it steals 1 SP per monster level with a success chance of 40% and grants one Spirit Sphere. Ineffective against Boss monsters and WoE guardians.

263.name: Triple Attack
263.description: Enables the chance of automatically delivering a triple attack in battle. This skill can be followed up with Chain Combo.

264.name: Body Relocation
264.description: Instantly teleport to a targeted spot if there are no obstacles between the caster and destination.
requirements: Spirits Recovery 2, Asura Strike 3, Steel Body 3

265.name: Dodge
265.description: Increases flee rate by 2 per skill level.

266.name: Investigate
266.description: Attacks an enemy with a massive psychic impact that will inflict more damage when the enemy has high Defense. Each cast requires 1 Spirit Sphere. Spirit Sphere is refunded if target is killed with Investigate

267.name: Finger Offensive
267.description: Attacks a distant enemy by firing Spirit Spheres. Each cast requires at least one Spirit Sphere.

268.name: Steel Body
268.description: Doubles the Monk's DEF and quadruples MDEF up to 90 as a maximum while decreasing Movement and Attack Speed. While this skill is active, other skills cannot be used.

269.name: Blade Stop
269.description: Immobilizes both the caster and enemy until either one of them dies or the Monk uses a skill. Higher skill level allows the use of other skills during the Blade Stop status. Ineffective against Boss monsters. Each cast requires 1 Spirit Sphere.

270.name: Critical Explosion
270.description: Temporarily increases caster's Critical Attack rate for period of time. During the Explosion Spirits status, SP regen is suspended. Requires five Spirit Spheres to cast.

271.name: Asura Strike
271.description: Only usable during Critical Explosion status. Inflicts a devastating amount of damage by consuming the caster's remaining SP. After using Asura Strike, the Explosion Spirits status is automatically canceled and the Monk will not be able to restore SP naturally for 5 minutes. Each cast requires 5 Spirit Spheres.

272.name: Chain Combo
272.description: Only usable during Triple Attack delay. Spins a target while attacking the enemy with a combo hit. This skill can be followed up with Combo Finish.

273.name: Combo Finish
273.description: Only usable during Chain Combo delay. This skill can be followed up with the Asura Strike skill if the user is in Explosion Spirits state and has summoned at least 4 Spirit Spheres. Each cast requires one Spirit Sphere.

274.name: Advanced Book
274.description: Increases Attack Speed, and physical damage with Book class weapons.

275.name: Cast Cancel
275.description: Only usable while casting a magic spell. Immediately cancel a spell, allowing the caster to take another action without any delay.

276.name: Magic Rod
276.description: Upon being attacked with a skill, using Magic Rod will absorb a spell as SP rather than taking the damage from such spells. Countering Spell Breaker with Magic Rod will reduce the target's SP by 20% when it is successful.

277.name: Spell Breaker
277.description: Interrupts a magic spell cast by an enemy and Sage receives an amount of SP the enemy used to cast that spell. At Skill Level 5, this skill will also inflict 20% of the target's(NonBoss) MaxHP as damage to the target and the Sage will absorb half of this damage. Bosses can be interrupted, but the success rate against Boss Monsters is only 10%.

278.name: Free Cast
278.description: Allows movement and attack while casting spells.

279.name: Auto Spell
279.description: Autocasts certain magic spells by 30% chance while attacking enemies with physical attacks. Spells that are auto cast through Auto Spell only consume 2/3 of the required SP. Spells that are not learned by the caster cannot be cast even if they are listed below as options.

280.name: Flame Launcher
280.description: Endows a party member's weapon with the Fire Element for the skill's duration. Additionally, Level 1 Flame Launcher grants the target Impositio Manus level 5 for 120 seconds.

281.name: Frost Weapon
281.description: Endows a party member's weapon with the Water Element for the skill's duration. Additionally, Level 1 Frost Weapon grants the target Impositio Manus level 5 for 120 seconds.

282.name: Lightning Loader
282.description: Endows a party member's weapon with the Wind Element for the skill's duration. Additionally, Level 1 Lightning Loader grants the target Impositio Manus level 5 for 120 seconds.

283.name: Seismic Weapon
283.description: Endows a party member's weapon with the Earth Element for the skill's duration. Additionally, Level 1 Seismic Weapon grants the target Impositio Manus level 5 for 120 seconds.

284.name: Dragonology
284.description: Increases resistance and damage against Dragon monsters. Provides +1 INT at levels 1 and 2, +2 INT at levels 3 and 4, and +3 INT at level 5. The following bonuses are received against Dragons only.

285.name: Volcano
285.description: Covers a 7x7 area with an enchantment that enchances the fire property and characters wearing fire property armors. Also disables the use of the Wizard spell Ice Wall on the affected tiles. Also provides the following bonuses when standing on a tile enchanted with Volcano. Upon leaving the Volcano area, the persistence buff timer is reduced to 120 seconds(if current timer is more than 2 minutes).

286.name: Deluge
286.description: Covers a 7x7 area with an enchantment that enchances the water property and characters wearing water property armors. Also enables the use of the Wizard spell Water Ball and Priest skill Aqua Benedicta. Also provides the following bonuses when standing on a tile enchanted with Deluge. Upon leaving the Deluge area, the persistence buff timer is reduced to 120 seconds(if current timer is more than 2 minutes).

levels.effect: +10% Water DMG, +4% SP Regen rate, Heals +1% HP/sec
+15% Water DMG, +7% SP Regen rate, Heals +1% HP/sec
+20% Water DMG, +10% SP Regen rate, Heals +1% HP/sec

287.name: Violent Gale
287.description: Covers a 7x7 area with an enchantment that enchances the wind property and characters wearing wind property armors. Also increases the duration of Fire Wall by 50% on the affected tiles. Movement speed given by Violent Gale does not stack with any other speed bonus. Upon leaving the Violent Gale area, the persistence buff timer is reduced to 120 seconds(if current timer is more than 2 minutes).

288.name: Land Protector
288.description: Casts a spell that will block or cancel ground targeting spells or enchantments. Other Sage skills that target the ground can't be cast in the area enchanted by Land Protector. Traps as well as non-ensemble Dancer/Bard skills can be cast on top of Land Protector. Will cover a 7x7 area for levels 1 and 2, a 9x9 area for levels 3 and 4, and an 11x11 area for level 5 of this skill.

289.name: Dispel
289.description: Casting Dispel has a chance of canceling all magic effects that have been cast on the target. The probability of success is equal to 50% + 10% Per Skill Level.

290.name: Abracadabra
290.description: Randomly accesses a castable skill that the Sage can then cast. Some skills available through Abracadabra are unique to the skill and cannot be cast by other means.

291.name: Monocell
291.description: Transmogrify a target into a Poring for the skill's duration. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

292.name: Class Change
292.description: Transmogrify a target into a Boss monster for the skill's duration. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

293.name: Summon Monster
293.description: Summons a random monster, as per Dead Branch. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

294.name: Reverse Orcish
294.description: Changes head of another player to that of an Orc. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

295.name: Death
295.description: Kill enemy instantly, with no item drop or experience gain. Success chance based on skill level. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

296.name: Fortune
296.description: It gets the LV of the Target * the Zeny as of 100. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

297.name: Taming Monster
297.description: Tame monster as if a taming item was used on it. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

298.name: Question
298.description: Create a ? emote above monster's head. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

299.name: Gravity
299.description: Create a Drop Emote above caster's head. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

300.name: Level Up
300.description: Gain a level. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

301.name: Instant Death
301.description: Commit suicide. Experience is lost as normal. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

302.name: Full Recovery
302.description: Recover all HP and SP, and stop any abnormal status effects. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

303.name: Coma
303.description: Drop to 1 HP and SP. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

304.name: Adaptation to Circumstances
304.description: Cancels the current song or dance. The Bard or Dancer must wait a few moments before using the same song.

305.name: Encore
305.description: Performs the last song or dance again at half the SP cost.

306.name: Lullaby
306.description: Casts sleep on all enemies within a 9x9 area of effect. Effect will occur every 6 seconds for 60 seconds (11 times) and is affected by INT of the caster, but it has a chance to fail depending on resistances. Cannot be cancelled by Dispel.

307.name: Mr. Kim A Rich Man
307.description: Increases experience gained from non-boss monsters for all players in the song's 9x9 area. Cannot be canceled by Dispel.

308.name: Eternal Chaos
308.description: Reduces VIT DEF of all enemies in the area of effect to zero. Hard DEF is unaffected. Cannot be canceled by Dispel.

309.name: A Drum on the Battlefield
309.description: Increase attack and defense of party members in the area of effect. SP upkeep is equal to 1 SP every 5 seconds. Cannot be canceled by Dispel.

310.name: The Ring of Nibelungen
310.description: Increases damage of all Level 4 Weapons within area of effect by providing extra damage that bypasses the enemy's defense. SP upkeep is equal to 1 SP every 3 seconds. Cannot be canceled by Dispel.

311.name: Loki's Veil
311.description: Blocks all skill use for everything (including players) within a 9x9 area of effect. Cannot be canceled by Dispell. Does not work against Boss monsters.

312.name: Into the Abyss
312.description: All party members within the area of effect are able to cast spells without gemstones and lay traps without using an item. Abracadabra still requires one Yellow Gemstone. Cannot be canceled by Dispel.

313.name: Invulnerable Siegfried
313.description: Increases resistance against all elemental attacks as well as status ailments for all players in the 9x9 area of effect. Cannot be canceled by Dispel.

315.name: Musical Lesson
315.description: Raises Attack Power of instruments and increases the effect of songs. This skill also partially counters the walking speed reduction while performing. If mastered, the skill will increase attack speed by 10%.

316.name: Musical Strike
316.description: Fires a powerful arrow at the enemy that may be used during songs. Element type of attack is dependent on equipped arrows.

317.name: Dissonance
317.description: Hits enemies in area with a slow sonic attack, piercing their defense. Can overlap with a second Bard's song. Consumes 1 SP every 3 seconds while active.

318.name: Frost Joker
318.description: Causes frozen status on everything (including players) within 16 cells of the caster. In PvP or Guild siege areas, this skill works on caster as well.

319.name: A Whistle
319.description: Raises Flee Rate and Perfect Dodge for players within the 7x7 area of effect. The Flee Rate is increased by an additional 1 per 10 AGI of the Bard and perfect dodge is increased by 1 per 10 LUK of the Bard. Musical lessons also increase each Flee and perfect dodge by 1 per skill level. The skill consumes 1 SP every 5 seconds through its duration. Base bonuses before additional bonuses are as follows.

320.name: Assassin Cross of Sunset
320.description: Increases attack speed of all players in the area of effect. Effect stacks with Speed Potions, but not with Adrenaline Rush or Weapon Quicken skills. The bonus is further enhanced by the Bard's AGI, adding 1% ASPD per 10 AGI as well as 1% per two levels of Musical Lessons. The skill requires 1 SP 3 seconds to maintain. The base ASPD bonuses are as follows. Attack Speed bonuses do not apply to bow or gun weapons.

321.name: A Poem of Bragi
321.description: Reduces casting and cast delay after casting a spell or ability. Cannot be used in conjunction with the Priest's Suffragium skill. Each level of Music Lessons reduces the cast time by 1% and cast delay by 2%. Every 10 INT that the Bard has reduces the cast delay by 2%. Every 10 DEX the Bard has reduces the cast time of players by 1%. The skill requires 1 SP every 5 seconds to maintain. The base bonus of this song are as follows.

322.name: The Apple of Idun
322.description: Heals players in a 7x7 area around the Bard and increases their HP. Each level of Music Lessons increases the MaxHP bonus by 1% and HP recovered every six seconds by 5. Every 10 VIT of the Bard also increases the heal by 5 every six seconds. The skill requires 1 SP every 6 seconds to maintain. The base bonus of this song are as follows.

323.name: Dancing Lesson
323.description: Raises Attack Power of whip weapons and increases the effect of songs. This skill also partially counters the walking speed reduction while performing. If mastered, the skill will increase CRIT rate by 10%.

324.name: Throw Arrow
324.description: Fires a powerful arrow at the enemy that may be used during songs. Element type of attack is dependent on equipped arrows.

325.name: Ugly Dance
325.description: Hits enemies in area with a SP draining attack. Consumes 1 SP every 3 seconds while active.

326.name: Scream
326.description: Causes stun status on everything (including players) within 16 cells of the caster. In PvP or Guild siege areas, this skill works on caster as well.

327.name: Humming
327.description: Increase Hit of players in the area of effect. HIT bonuses are increased further by 1 per level of Dance Lessons learned by the Dancer. Also, HIT bonus is increased by 1 for every 10 DEX the Dancer has. The skill requires 1 SP every 5 seconds to maintain. Base bonus rates are as follows. Has a 7x7 range.

328.name: Please Don't Forget Me
328.description: Decreases the ASPD and movement speed of enemies in the 7x7 area of effect. Each level of Dance Lessons causes an additional 1% ASPD reduction per level as well as a 1% movement speed reduction every two skill levels. Further, for each 10 DEX the enemy's ASPD is reduced by 1%. For each 10 AGI of the Dancer, the enemy's movement speed is also reduced by 1%. The skill requires 1 SP every 10 seconds to maintain. The base debuffs are as follows.

329.name: Fortune's Kiss
329.description: Increases the critical rate of players within the 7x7 area of effect. Each level of Dance Lessons improves the CRIT bonus by 1%. Every 10 LUK of the Dancer also improves the CRIT bonus by 1%. The skill requires 1 SP every 4 seconds to maintain. The base buffs are as follows.

330.name: Service for You
330.description: Increases the maximum SP of players in the 7x7 area of effect. Also reduces SP usage of those players. Each level of Dance Lessons reduces the SP cost of skills by an additional 1%. Every 10 INT of the Dancer further reduces the SP cost of skills by 1% as well as increases the SP of players in the the song's area of effect by 1%. The skill requires 1 SP every 5 seconds to maintain. The base buffs are as follows.

337.name: Throw Tomahawk
337.description: Enable use of the Skill Throw Tomahawk.

355.name: Aura Blade
355.description: Enchants equipped weapon with an aura that will grant additional damage that is unaffected by the caster's Accuracy Rate or the enemy's Defense.
requirements: Bash 5, Magnum Break 5, Two Handed Sword Mastery 5

356.name: Parry
356.description: Block damage from physical ttack using Two Handed Sword. When successful block an attack, caster will be forced to pause momentarily. Requires Two Handed Sword.
requirements: Provoke 5, Two-Handed Sword Mastery 10, Sword Quickening 3

357.name: Concentration
357.description: When activated, this skill endows the caster with the Endure effect and increased Attack Power and Accuracy, but will also temporarily reduce Defense.
requirements: Increase HP Recovery 5, Spear Mastery 5, Peco Peco Ride 1

358.name: Tension Relax
358.description: Triples your HP recovery speed when sitting. This skill cancels out immediately if you stand up, use items, change equip or are hit by somebody else.

359.name: Berserk
359.description: Requires you to have a JobLV of at least 50. It triples your HP and replenishes them (to the now tripled maximum), doubles your Damage, increases your ASPD by 30%, increases your movement speed (does not stack with other increase except Peco Peco), gives the Endure effect at no further cost but halves your Flee Rate and sets ALL Def AND Mdef to 0 for the skill's duration. It also drains 5% of your current HP every 15 seconds. You cannot chat (chat mute), change equips, use any healing items or receive any heals while this skill is in effect. You do not regain HP and SP naturally for 5 minutes after the skill ends (you can be healed or use items though). The Skill cancels out if your HP drops to 100 or below. Can be used during Guild Siege.

361.name: Assumptio
361.description: Reduce damage taken from enemies by half for the spell's duration. Cannot be cast inside a guild castle, but retains its effect after entering one. Casting Kyrie Eleison on someone that has Assumptio will cancel Assumptio, likewise casting Assumptio on someone with Kyrie will cancel Kyrie.

362.name: Aspergillium
362.description: This skill creates an absolutely perfect defense zone of 5x5 cells around the caster that blocks any type of attack out of~ or into this area. Anyone can come in, but people who are inside cannot attack. The skill is canceled if the Priest moves or uses another skill. Does not work against Boss monsters and can't be used during the War of Emperium. This skill Requires 1 Blue Gemstone ,1 Yellow Gemstone, 1 Red Gemstone  and 1 Holy Water.

363.name: Meditatio
363.description: When meditating (sitting), you will have a better SP Recovery as well as increase your Maximum SP. This skill also improves the amount of HP that are healed by the Heal skill by 2% per SkillLV (sitting is of course not required).

364.name: Soul Drain
364.description: Every time you kill an enemy using spells, you will receive a certain amount of SP back, depending on the monster level. The formula is MonsterLV x Drain. The Drain amount is (95+15*SkillLV)% (e.g. killing a LV 20 Enemy with a LV 5 Soul Drain will give you 34 SP). This skill also increases your Maximum SP by 2% per SkillLV. The SP drain only works for targeted spells, not area spells.

365.name: Magic Crasher
365.description: You do an attack that calculates damage using your Matk instead of Atk but is decreased using enemy's Def, not Mdef. This skills overall damage is affected by cards you have in your weapon, weapon element, size and element of the target and it might miss depending on your Dex.

366.name: Amplify Magic Power
366.description: This skill amplifies the spell damage by boosting your Matk for the overall skil. The bonus is 10% per SkillLV.

367.name: Pressure
367.description: Summons a massive crucifix to crush enemies. This skill inflicts a fixed amount of damage, depending on the skill's level, which ignores DEF and ATK. On other players, this skill will also drain SP. Pressure cannot be cancelled by any method.

368.name: Sacrifice
368.description: Enhances the damage of 5 physical attacks after activating this skill. Each attack enhanced by Sacrifice will drain an amount of HP equal to 9% of character's MaxHP.

369.name: Gospel
369.description: Sings a hymn that will cause one out of 10 different negative status effects to enemies and will endow one out of 10 positive statuses upon Party Members within this skill's range. This skill is cancelled if the caster is Silenced during the casting of Gospel.

370.name: Palm Push Strike
370.description: Strikes an enemy using the palms, pushing back the enemy and causing damage, which is determined by the skill's level, after 1 second delay. This skill can only be used during the Explosion Spirits status.

371.name: Tiger Knuckle Fist
371.description: A combo skill that can be cast after using Chain Combo. An enemy hit by this skill is immobilized for a short period of time. Each cast requires 1 Spirit Sphere.

372.name: Chain Crush Combo
372.description: Also a combination skill, can only be chained after Combo Finish OR Tiger Knuckle Fist. Tiger Knuckle Fist can not be chained after this, but Asura Strike can.

373.name: Health Conversion
373.description: Converts 10% of your HP into SP. The higher the skill level the more effective the conversion will be. The conversion rate is 10:1 modified by SkillLV, so a 2000 HP Professor with Health Conversion LV 3 would consume 2000*10%=200 HP and obtain a total of 200*30%=60 SP.

374.name: Soul Change
374.description: Exchange SP of the target with your SP. With this exchange it's not possible for any of the partners to exceed their Maximum SP. If you use this on a monster, you regain 3% of your SP. You can't use this skill on a monster again that already had Soul Change. You can use this skill in Siege Mode (WoE).

375.name: Soul Burn
375.description: This skill will burn all SP the target has, thus damaging it with its own SP. Since this damage is done to the mental system, it will be decreased by the target's Mdef. If you fail this skill, YOUR SP will be drained, and you will damage yourself. The damage is equal to twice the removed SP.

376.name: Advanced Katar Mastery
376.description: Enhances damage inflicted with Katar class weapons.

378.name: Enchant Deadly Poison
378.description: Enchants equipped weapon with deadly poison to enhance its damage and poison targets by chance, causing the target's HP to dramatically decrease for the poison's duration. This damage enhancement will not apply to Boss monsters. Each cast requires 1 Poison Bottle.

379.name: Soul Destroyer
379.description: Inflicts a ranged attack to a target, calculated as half of the target's DEF added to half of its MDEF, that is affected by the caster's INT and ATK.
requirements: Double Attack 5, Envenom 5, Cloaking 3, Enchant Poison 6

380.name: True Sight
380.description: Adds +5 to all Stats, as well as increases attack accuracy, weapon damage and critical attack rate.

381.name: Falcon Assault
381.description: Commands Falcon to attack an enemy with numerous strikes.

382.name: Sharp Shooting
382.description: Shoots an arrow with incredible might directly towards a targeted spot, greatly damaging any enemies in its path. This is a Critical Attack that is calculated as the caster's Critical Attack Rate +20.

383.name: Wind Walk
383.description: Increases movement speed and Flee Rate of the caster and Party Members. However, movement speed will not increased if a similar effect, such as Increase Agility, has already been cast. Skills which decrease movement speed, such as Quagmire, cancel the movement speed increase from Wind Walker.

384.name: Melt Down
384.description: This skill has the chance of destroying an equipped weapon or armor when used in PvP zones on other players, or to decrease Attack Power or Defense when used on monsters. This skill's level affects its duration and rate of success.

387.name: Cart Boost
387.description: Increases Movement Speed when a Pushcart is equipped. Effect which decrease movement speed cannot interfere with this skill.

389.name: Chase Walk
389.description: Enters a special Hiding status in which caster can move without being detected by skills. However, the caster will leave footprints and can be damaged by skills that target the ground. Ineffective against Insect, Demon and Boss monsters. Passive: Learning this skill multiplicatively increases Raid damage and adds to Backstab opportunity modifier . During WoE, this skill will consume 5 times as much SP.

390.name: Sword Reject
390.description: If enemy is using a Sword Class Weapon, activating this skill deflects attacks, reducing damage from Swords by a percentage. A total of 3 attacks can be deflected after this skill is casted. On monsters, the damage that is deflected will be directed back at the monster.

392.name: Alchemy
392.description: This skill has been dropped by Gravity. You can create many items that are needed for the Pharmacy skill such as Empty Bottles, Empty Potion Bottles and Test Tubes.

393.name: Synthesis Potion
393.description: This skill has been dropped by Gravity. Combine different potions to create new ones. There are already set rules to what can be mixed, and the problem is the success rate. You can create potions that weigh less, but perform the same... or create heavier potions that heal for far more. For potions that summon creatures to attack, they might have better attack rate, or have a new skill to use.

394.name: Arrow Vulcan
394.description: Fires an awesome flurry of arrows at a targeted enemy. Requires Musical Instrument for Clown and Whip for Gypsy.
requirements: Musical Strike 1, Double Strafe 5, Arrow Shower 5,
Throw Arrow 1, Double Strafe 5, Arrow Shower 5,

395.name: Moonlit Water Mill
395.description: Clown and Gypsy ensemble skill that creates a 5*5 cell area around the casters where other players and monsters cannot enter. This skill cannot offer protection from magic or long ranged attacks. This skill cannot be cast in areas that are adjacent to obstacles.

396.name: Marionette Control
396.description: Targeted Party Member receives a bonus to all Stats equal to half of the Stats of the caster. However, each of the target's Stats cannot exceed 99. This skill is cancelled if this Party Member is more than 7 cells away from the caster.

397.name: Spiral Pierce
397.description: Hits an enemy with spiraling strikes that immobilize it for a second and inflict an amount of damage determined by the skill's level and the weight of the equipped weapon. This skill's level also affects its cast time and delay.
requirements: Spear Mastery 10, Pierce 5, Riding 1, Spear Stab 5

398.name: Head Crush
398.description: Brutally strikes an enemy with the chance of causing the Bleeding status, which will make the target continuously receive extra damage for a while.

399.name: Joint Beat
399.description: Strikes an enemy's vital point to cause various abnormal statuses. This skill's level affects the Attack Power and the success rate of causing abnormal status effects. Requires Spear Class Weapon.

400.name: Napalm Vulcan
400.description: Delivers multiple psychokinetic blows at an enemy with a low chance of causing an abnormal status. This skill's level affects the number of strikes from Napalm Vulcan. All levels of this spell ignores 50% of the enemy Magic Defense (both the hard and soft defense)

401.name: Dangerous Soul Collect
401.description: Summons 5 Spirit Spheres at one time. The cast time of this skill is twice the cast time of the Call Spirits skill.

402.name: Mind Breaker
402.description: Induces mental turmoil in an enemy that will reduce its Magic Defense, but will also increases its Magic Attack Power. This skill's level affects its rate of success.

403.name: Memorize
403.description: Reduces cast time for a skill by half for 5 casts. This skill is canceled when caster dies, but otherwise it has no duration. Memorize's cast time, which is unaffected by DEX, is 5 seconds.

404.name: Wall of Fog
404.description: Creates a wall of fog in a 5*3 cell area that will cause the Blind status on players and monsters. All long ranged attacks targeted at players within the skill's range will have a greater chance of missing and have reduced damage. Negative effects only apply to monsters in normal fields, but will also apply to players in PvP zones.

405.name: Spider Web
405.description: Shoots a spider web that will bind and immobilize a target, and decrease its Flee Rate by half for 8 seconds. Fire elemental attacks will cause 2.5 times more damage on Fiber Locked targets and cancel the Fiber Locked status. A maximum of 2 Spider Webs can be shot at once. Consumes 1 Cobweb.

406.name: Meteor Assault
406.description: Attacks all enemies in a 5*5 cell area around the caster with the chance of causing status such as Stun, Blind or Bleed.
requirements: Katar Mastery 5, Right-Hand Mastery 3, Sonic Blow 5, Soul Destroyer 1

407.name: Create Deadly Poison
407.description: Creates a bottle of Deadly Poison that will increase the ASPD of Assassin Crosses with the risk of being inflicted with the Poison status, but will instantly kill characters in any other job if they drink it. Caster's DEX and LUK affect this skill's success rate. If this skill fails, the caster loses an amount of HP equal to 25% of his MaxHP. Items required to create Deadly Poison: 1 Empty Bottle 1 Poison Spore 1 Venom Canine 1 Bee Sting 1 Cactus Needle 1 Berserk Potion 1 Karvodailnirol

408.name: Mom, Dad, I love you!
